title: Florida plane crash rescue: Air Force reservists pull 11 survivors to safety; details here
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   A plane crash occurred in Florida.
*   Air Force reservists were involved in the rescue operation.
*   They successfully pulled 11 survivors to safety.

title: Pressure mounts on UK PM Starmer to resign amid growing discontent: Here's a look at some of the contenders
content:
Here are 3 bullet points summarizing the headline:

*   UK Prime Minister Starmer is facing significant and mounting pressure to resign.
*   This pressure is driven by growing discontent directed at his leadership.
*   Discussions have begun regarding potential contenders who could succeed him as Prime Minister.

title: Alex Murdaugh murder convictions overturned by South Carolina Supreme Court over jury influence concerns
content:
Here are 3 bullet points summarizing the headline:

*   Alex Murdaugh's murder convictions have been overturned.
*   The South Carolina Supreme Court issued the decision.
*   The overturning is due to concerns about jury influence in the original trial.

title: Supreme Court directs States to install panic buttons, tracking devices in public transport vehicles
content:
Here are three bullet points summarizing the headline:

*   The Supreme Court has issued a directive to all States.
*   States are mandated to install panic buttons and tracking devices.
*   These safety measures must be implemented in public transport vehicles.

title: In 2024, NTA and Govt. did not want to cancel NEET, cited student welfare in Supreme Court
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   In 2024, the NTA and Government opposed the cancellation of the NEET exam.
*   They presented this stance before the Supreme Court.
*   Their primary justification for not cancelling was cited as student welfare.

title: DMK boycotts floor test; urges CM to continue with Dravidian model welfare schemes
content:
The DMK boycotted the floor test.
*   They urged the Chief Minister to continue implementing welfare schemes.
*   These schemes are specifically based on the "Dravidian model."
